ideas.title: Answer Engine Optimization: Staying Visible as AI Reshapes Search in 2026
ideas.target_audience: Marketing leads, founders, and growth managers
paa_questions: How does answer engine optimization affect organic revenue in 2026?
What is answer engine optimization in practice?
How do I get cited in AI overviews without keyword stuffing?
Does structured data help generative search visibility?
How long should FAQ answers be for featured snippets?
ideas.serp_analysis: SERP snapshot for 'answer engine optimization': dominant intent is **informational** at the **awareness** funnel stage. Observed SERP features include featured_snippet, video. Recent titles in the news layer include Safari’s New MCP Server Enables AI Debugging For SEO And CWV via @sejournal, @martinibuster; Google Put AI Visibility Inside The SEO Tool On Purpose via @sejournal, @slobodanmanic; Fake DMCA Complaints Keep Erasing Real Pages From Google – What To Watch For via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern. This draft targets extractable answers, corroboration, and conversion clarity (SXO).
